company.name: Kidzz Star Jumpers
company.description: Family-owned and operated for 27 years, Kidzz Star Jumpers provides high-quality, clean, and sanitized inflatables and party equipment across the Bay Area. From small backyard birthday parties to large corporate events, we handle every event with the utmost care. We serve San Mateo, San Francisco, Santa Clara, and Alameda Counties.

items.name: Razzle Dazzle Castle Jumper
items.description: A stunning castle-themed bounce house decorated with colorful towers and fun graphics. Features a large bouncing area, safety netting on all sides, easy-access entry ramp, and a basketball hoop inside. Our most popular rental for princess-themed parties! Cleaned and sanitized before every rental.
items.safetyNotes: Maximum 5–6 kids of equal size. Adult supervision required at all times. Not suitable for adults.

items.name: Castle Jumper
items.description: Classic castle-themed bounce house — a reliable crowd-pleaser at any party. Features a spacious bounce area, safety netting on all four sides, and a built-in basketball hoop. Perfect for birthday parties, school events, and backyard celebrations. Great value for a traditional bounce house experience.
items.safetyNotes: Maximum 5–6 kids of equal size. Adult supervision required at all times.

items.name: Castle Toddler Bounce House
items.description: Specially designed for the littlest bouncers! This compact toddler-safe bounce house has lower walls, soft interior padding, and a gentle bounce surface — ideal for ages 1–5. Perfect for toddler birthday parties or playgroups. Features include a safety ball pit area inside and easy visibility for supervising adults.
items.safetyNotes: For ages 1–5 only. No children over 5. Always have an adult within arm's reach.

items.name: Disney Princess 2-Jump (Large)
items.description: An extra-large bounce house with two separate bouncing chambers featuring full-color artwork of Cinderella, Ariel, Belle, Rapunzel, and more. The dual chambers allow kids of different ages to bounce safely. A dream come true for any little princess — this is our largest bounce house.
items.safetyNotes: Separate chambers for younger (2–5) and older (6–12) children recommended.

items.name: Razzle Dazzle 4-in-1 Combo
items.description: The ultimate party combo! This 4-in-1 inflatable features a bounce area, climbing wall, slide, and obstacle section. Includes interchangeable themed banners — choose from Barbie, Hello Kitty, Tinkerbell, Moana, Dora, Sofia the First, Frozen, Little Mermaid, My Little Pony, Unicorn, and many more. One unit, endless themes!
items.safetyNotes: One person on the slide at a time. Maximum weight per climber 150 lbs.

items.name: Razzle Dazzle 4-in-1 Combo (Wet)
items.description: Beat the heat with the water version of our beloved Razzle Dazzle 4-in-1 Combo! Features a wet slip-and-slide section in addition to the bounce area, climbing wall, and obstacle course. Includes interchangeable themed banners — Disney Princess, Frozen, Moana, Sofia the 1st, Little Mermaid, and more. Requires a water hose connection.
items.safetyNotes: One person on the slide at a time. Ages 3+ only. Wet surface — use caution when climbing.

items.name: Module 5-in-1 Combo
items.description: The all-in-one party solution! This massive 5-in-1 combo unit includes a bounce house, two slides, climbing wall, obstacle section, and basketball hoop inside. Available in multiple themes. Great for larger events where you want maximum entertainment value from a single unit.
items.safetyNotes: One child at a time on slides. No flipping or rough play. Adult supervision required.

items.name: The Big Kahuna Slide (Wet)
items.description: Towering single-lane water slide — one of the most thrilling rides we offer! Kids climb up the safety-handle ladder and plunge down into the splash pool at the base. Decorated with tropical colors and graphics. Requires a garden hose connection to keep the surface wet and fast. A total showstopper at any summer party.
items.safetyNotes: One rider at a time. Children under 5 not recommended. Must be able to exit splash pool unassisted.

items.name: Rampage Slide (Wet)
items.description: The Rampage delivers the ultimate adrenaline rush — our tallest and most extreme water slide! At 24 feet tall, riders fly down a long, steep lane into a massive splash pool below. Not for the faint of heart. This is the go-to centerpiece for a party that people will be talking about for years.
items.safetyNotes: Ages 6+ only. One rider at a time. Must be at least 48" tall. No diving or jumping off sides.

items.name: 24' Double Lane Slide (Wet)
items.description: Race your friends down this massive 24-foot dual-lane water slide! Two riders can compete side-by-side in this thrilling head-to-head racing slide. Features a wide launching platform at the top, safety handles all the way up, and a large shared splash pool at the bottom. Our biggest crowd-pleaser for summer parties.
items.safetyNotes: One rider per lane. Ages 6+ only. Must be 48" tall. No pushing or roughhousing at launch.

items.name: 50ft Obstacle Course
items.description: Get the competitive energy going with this 50-foot inflatable obstacle course! Features pop-ups, crawl tunnels, climbing walls, and a slide finish. Perfect for group events, school carnivals, or corporate team-building. Two lanes allow head-to-head racing. A crowd favorite at every event!
items.safetyNotes: No pushing or shoving. Remove shoes before entering. Ages 5+ only.

items.name: Dunk Tank
items.description: The classic party challenge! Our dunk tank holds 500 gallons of water for a massive splash. Sit on the seat and dare your friends to knock you in! Three balls are included and the tank comes in several themes. A huge hit at school carnivals, company picnics, and block parties. Requires 8ft width and 20ft throwing area.
items.dimensions: 8ft wide x 7ft tall (20ft throwing area needed)
items.safetyNotes: Person in seat must be able to swim or wear a flotation device. Seat weight capacity 250 lbs. Supervise young children near open water.

items.name: Popcorn Machine
items.description: Classic commercial-grade popcorn machine rental. Makes fresh, delicious popcorn in minutes. Comes with 50 servings of popcorn supplies (kernels, oil, salt, and bags). Easy to operate — plug in and go! Great add-on for any party or event.
items.safetyNotes: Keep away from flammable materials. Adult operation recommended.

items.name: Cotton Candy Machine
items.description: Spin up some sweet fun with a cotton candy machine rental! Includes 50 servings of cotton candy floss sugar in assorted flavors (pink vanilla, blue raspberry, and grape). The machine is easy to use and adds a carnival atmosphere to any party.
items.safetyNotes: Keep away from children under 3. Hot spinning element — adult operation only.

items.name: BBQ Grill
items.description: Add some serious flavor to your event with a BBQ grill rental! Our large commercial-grade propane BBQ grill is perfect for feeding a crowd. Great for birthday parties, corporate picnics, and community events. Propane not included — pick up locally or ask about add-on bundles.
items.safetyNotes: Propane not included. Keep grill away from inflatables and flammable materials. Adult operation only.

items.name: 10x10 Pop Up Tent
items.description: Quick-setup 10x10 pop-up canopy tent — perfect for adding shade to any backyard party or event. Commercial-grade frame with white top. Easy to set up in minutes. Great for individual vendor booths, food stations, or small shaded areas.
items.safetyNotes: Do not use in winds over 25mph. Must be staked or weighted on all corners.

items.name: 10x10 Tent with Walls
items.description: Our 10x10 pop-up tent with full sidewalls — ideal when you need shade AND wind/sun protection. The removable sidewalls can be attached on any combination of sides for maximum flexibility. Great for outdoor food service, vendor booths, or when you need a more enclosed private space.
items.safetyNotes: Do not use in winds over 25mph. Must be staked or weighted on all corners.

items.name: 10x20 Pop Up Tent
items.description: Double the coverage with this 10x20 pop-up canopy tent. Perfect for larger seating areas, buffet setups, or long vendor rows. Commercial-grade frame with white top. Can comfortably shade up to 20 guests. Easy setup without tools.
items.safetyNotes: Do not use in winds over 25mph. Must be staked or weighted on all corners.

items.name: 10x30 Pop Up Tent
items.description: Our largest pop-up canopy option — the 10x30 tent is perfect for large parties, outdoor receptions, and corporate events. Provides shade for 30+ guests. Commercial-grade aluminum frame with white top. Can be configured with optional sidewalls for added protection.
items.safetyNotes: Do not use in winds over 25mph. Must be staked or weighted on all corners.

items.name: 20x20 Canopy Tent
items.description: Provide shade and shelter for your guests with this large 20x20 canopy tent. Commercial-grade frame with white top. Can accommodate up to 40 people. Great for backyard parties, school events, and corporate gatherings. Sides available upon request.
items.safetyNotes: Do not use in high winds over 25mph. Must be staked or weighted on all corners.

items.name: Tables & Chairs Package (10 Tables / 80 Chairs)
items.description: Our most popular seating package — 10 rectangular 6-foot folding tables and 80 matching folding chairs. Perfect for parties, school events, or corporate gatherings. Tables seat 8 comfortably. Chairs are durable plastic folding chairs in white or black. Smaller packages also available — contact us for custom quantities.
items.safetyNotes: Max weight per chair 250 lbs. Do not stand on tables or chairs.

items.name: Toy Story Jumper
items.description: Bring the magic of Toy Story to life with this colorful themed bounce house! Featuring Woody, Buzz Lightyear, and the whole Toy Story gang on bright, vibrant artwork. Kids will love bouncing in this spacious inflatable with safety netting on all sides and an interior basketball hoop.
items.safetyNotes: Maximum 5–6 kids of equal size. Adult supervision required at all times.

items.name: Razzle Dazzle Castle Modular
items.description: A modular castle bounce house with interchangeable themed banners — choose your princess theme! Features a spacious bouncing area, safety netting on all sides, entry ramp, and a basketball hoop inside. The modular banner system lets you personalize the theme to match your party.
items.safetyNotes: Maximum 5–6 kids of equal size. Adult supervision required at all times.

items.name: 4-in-1 Side Slide Combo
items.description: A versatile 4-in-1 combo unit featuring a bounce area, side slide, climbing wall, and obstacle section. Perfect for parties where you want maximum entertainment from a single unit. The side-exit slide design keeps the flow of kids moving safely.
items.safetyNotes: One person on the slide at a time. Maximum weight per climber 150 lbs.

items.name: Snow Cone Machine
items.description: Keep guests cool with fresh snow cones! Our commercial-grade snow cone machine shaves ice fast and comes with 50 servings of flavored syrup in assorted flavors. Easy plug-and-go operation — perfect for summer parties, school events, and carnivals.
items.safetyNotes: Keep away from children under 3. Adult operation recommended.

items.name: Bubble Machine with Stand
items.description: Add a magical touch to any party with our bubble machine! Continuously produces hundreds of bubbles per minute. Mounted on a stand for optimal bubble coverage. Kids of all ages love it — perfect as a fun accent to any outdoor event.
items.safetyNotes: Wet surfaces can be slippery. Keep away from electrical hazards.

items.name: Connect 4 (Giant)
items.description: Giant-sized Connect 4 game — a crowd-pleasing classic scaled up for outdoor events! Drop the oversized discs and try to connect four in a row before your opponent. Great for all ages at school carnivals, corporate picnics, and backyard parties.
items.safetyNotes: Pieces may be a choking hazard for children under 3.

items.name: Corn Hole
items.description: Classic corn hole (bean bag toss) boards for your event! Set includes two boards and 8 bean bags (4 per team). Great for all ages and perfect at BBQs, tailgates, school events, and backyard parties. Easy to set up and transport.
items.safetyNotes: Keep playing area clear of bystanders.

items.name: Food Warmer
items.description: Keep food warm and ready to serve at your event with our commercial food warmer. Perfect for large gatherings where food needs to stay at a safe serving temperature. Compatible with standard food pans (not included).
items.safetyNotes: Adult operation only. Keep away from flammable materials.

items.name: Generator (4500W / 5500W)
items.description: Need power at a location without electrical access? Our generator rental provides reliable 4500W–5500W of power — enough to run one or two inflatables simultaneously. Perfect for park events, open fields, and locations without outlets.
items.safetyNotes: Operate outdoors only. Keep away from inflatables and children. Propane/gas not included.
